body.title: Delete DB-mirrored paper echoes from active repos
body.result: 2 June 3 decisions + 13 decisions_log entries merged to TheIgorsProject; Igor confirmed running from devices/igor/
body.description:
Once T-igor-into-adc-device ships, ~/TheIgors becomes a code-free history archive. Move the non-code layers to ~/TheIgorsProject to make the boundary explicit: that repo is the project record, not a running system.

Contents to move: lab/design_docs/, lab/docs/, lab/design_docs_for_igor/, decisions_log.dsb, lab/notes.log, lab/claudecode/ (skills stay where they are — ~/.claude/skills/ is already their canonical home).

The venv, requirements.txt, and wild_igor/ in ~/TheIgors are removed once devices/igor/ is the live location.

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/lab/ (move to ~/TheIgorsProject/), ~/TheIgors venv (remove after migration)
**Design rules:** none — this is filesystem housekeeping, not code
**Scope boundary:** Git history in ~/TheIgors stays intact as a read-only archive. No palace nodes change — they reference content, not file paths. Gated on T-igor-into-adc-device.
**Completion criteria:** Igor runs from devices/igor/ with no reference to ~/TheIgors paths. All slate/skill paths still resolve. ~/TheIgors/lab/ contents exist under ~/TheIgorsProject/.
